title: Virtual Chemistry Lab
description: Mix chemicals, run experiments, and discover reactions in a safe virtual environment.

title: Solar System Scope
description: Explore the solar system in real-time 3D. Track planets, moons, and satellites.

title: Zygote Body
description: Explore the human body in 3D. Peel back layers to see muscles, organs, and bones.

title: Circuit Builder
description: Build and test electrical circuits with resistors, capacitors, LEDs, and more.

title: Wave Interference
description: Visualize wave interference patterns. Adjust frequency, amplitude, and observe the results.

title: Gravity Force Lab
description: Visualize gravitational force between objects and experiment with mass and distance.

title: Molecule Shapes
description: Explore the 3D structure of molecules. Build shapes from atoms and observe bond angles.

title: Energy Skate Park
description: Explore conservation of energy with a skater on a ramp. Add friction and see thermal energy.

title: Pendulum Lab
description: Experiment with pendulums. Change length, mass, angle and explore simple harmonic motion.

title: Plate Tectonics
description: Simulate Earth's tectonic plates. Create mountains, volcanoes, and ocean trenches.

title: Gene Expression Essentials
description: Explore how genes are transcribed and translated into proteins inside a cell.

title: Natural Selection
description: Simulate natural selection with bunnies. Introduce traits and watch evolution in action.

title: Lesson 12
description: An interactive lesson simulation. Explore concepts and experiment hands-on.
